bore payload-blind encrypted transfer
Product Relay Ops

Relay-based. Encrypted. Self-hostable.

File transfer that keeps the relay in the dark.

Bore moves a file between two machines with a short rendezvous code, a Noise handshake, and a relay that forwards encrypted bytes without becoming a storage or trust anchor.

Open relay operator surface See current shape
  • No accounts, no cloud mailbox, no payload inspection.
  • Verified runtime path today is relay-based, not direct peer-to-peer.
  • Same-origin operator page reads aggregate relay state from /status.

rendezvous code example

Ahcj7nQZclo-j15A_xGS8w-868-outer-crane-crane

Handshake
Noise XXpsk0
Channel
ChaCha20-Poly1305
Integrity
SHA-256
Relay role
encrypted frame broker

Current shipped path

Relay first, with the claims kept tight.

The active client in client/ creates or parses the rendezvous code, completes the cryptographic handshake, and streams encrypted file frames through the relay in services/relay/.

The relay is self-hostable and operationally narrow: it exposes /healthz and /status, brokers rooms, and forwards bytes. It does not decrypt or reinterpret transfer payloads.

What this web surface is for

A real product face plus a practical operator page.

Bore now ships an in-repo Astro frontend that tells the product story at the root path and gives relay operators a live, browser-facing status page at /ops/relay/.

It stays intentionally thin: mostly static HTML and CSS, light Alpine interaction for refreshing relay status, and no new control plane that would distort the current runtime.

Transfer lane

How the secure path works today.

  1. Sender opens a relay room and receives a full rendezvous code.
  2. Receiver joins with the same code.
  3. Both peers mix that code into a Noise XXpsk0 handshake.
  4. Encrypted transfer frames move through the relay over WebSockets.
  5. Receiver verifies the final SHA-256 digest before accepting the file.

Direct transport groundwork exists in lib/punchthrough/, but it is not part of the verified transfer path yet.

client/

CLI transfer engine

Rendezvous, handshake, framing, relay transport, and file integrity checks.

services/relay/

Payload-blind relay

Pairs peers, forwards encrypted frames, and serves health, status, and the web UI.

services/bore-admin/

CLI operator summary

Polls /status over HTTP for a terse terminal-side relay view.

lib/punchthrough/

Future direct lane

STUN probing and UDP hole-punching groundwork waiting for client integration.

Operator surface

Need the live relay picture?

The relay operator page shows uptime, room counts, and configured limits from the same /status endpoint that powers bore-admin status.

Open relay status page

Bore ships a verified relay-based path today. Direct transport remains planned work.

The relay pairs peers and forwards encrypted bytes. It should stay payload-blind.
